fields.title: Airbed
fields.description: An airbed is a specialized medical mattress designed to provide advanced comfort and pressure relief for patients who are bedridden or have limited mobility. It works using alternating air pressure technology, which helps reduce pressure points and prevents bed sores (pressure ulcers).

fields.title: Toilet Chair
fields.description: A toilet chair, also known as a commode chair, is a practical and convenient solution designed for individuals with limited mobility, elderly users, or patients recovering from surgery. It allows users to use the toilet safely and comfortably without needing to travel to the bathroom.

fields.title: Walker
fields.description: A walker is a supportive mobility aid designed to help individuals maintain balance, stability, and independence while walking. It is especially useful for elderly users, patients recovering from surgery, or those with limited mobility.

fields.title: WheelChair
fields.description: A wheelchair is a mobility aid designed to provide independence, comfort, and ease of movement for individuals with limited mobility or physical disabilities. It is built with a strong and lightweight frame, ensuring durability while allowing smooth navigation across different surfaces.

fields.title: Bed
fields.description: A hospital bed is a specially designed bed that provides comfort, safety, and support for patients during recovery or long-term care. Built with durable materials and advanced functionality, it allows easy adjustment of height, backrest, and leg positions to ensure maximum convenience for both patients and caregivers.

fields.title: Bed Matress
fields.description: A bed mattress is designed to provide superior comfort, support, and pressure relief for patients during rest and recovery. Specially crafted for hospital beds and home care use, it helps maintain proper body posture and reduces the risk of bed sores.
